---
title: 'Cascadia Daily GNSS Time Series Denoising: Graph Neural Network and Stack Filtering'
date: '2023-01-01'
author: [Loı̈c Bachelot, Amanda M Thomas, Diego Melgar, Jake Searcy, Yu-Sheng Sun]
publication: Seismica, **4** (2023).
categories: [environment]
url_source: 'https://seismica.library.mcgill.ca/article/view/1419'
url_preprint: ''
journ: Seismica
issue: 4
page: ''
year: 2023
image: ''
pub_number: 14
---
